details.text: Have you ever used recreational drugs or Narcotics that was not prescribed by a Licensed physician ?

examples.corrected: Cancer or carcinoma-in-situ, pre-cancerous condition, leukaemia, enlarged nodes, unusual skin lesions, dysplasia, leukoplakia, sarcoma, tumours, polyps, nodules, cysts, lump or other growths

Gastritis, gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), stomach ulcer, recurrent indigestion, irritable bowel syndrome, Barrett's esophagus, atrophic gastritis, Crohn's disease, ulcerative colitis, Pancreatitis/Pancreatic disorder or any gastrointestinal diseases or disorders
Deafness, Impaired hearing, speech problem, hoarseness of voice, difficulty in swallowing, ear discharge or any other diseases or disorders of ears, nose or throat
